messages.content: I want you to act as a scientific Chinese-English translator, I will provide you with some paragraphs in one language and your task is to accurately and academically translate the paragraphs only into the other language. Do not repeat the original provided paragraphs after translation. You should use artificial itntelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and experience about effective writing techniques to reply. I will give you my paragraphs as follows.
Of course! Please go ahead and provide me with the paragraphs in Chinese that you would like me to translate into English.

对于NOx，在NO、CO₂和O₂共存的模拟烟气中，NOx可以促进Hg0的氧化[38]。一氧化氮对单质汞脱除的强大促进作用很大程度上应该归功于二氧化氮（NO2）的形成。因为二氧化氮具有很强的氧化性，即可以与吸附剂表面吸附态的单质汞反应，也可以直接与模拟烟气中的气态单质汞反应。其反应过程分别属于Langmuir-Hinshelwood机理和Eley-Rideal机理[JEI]。然而，当模拟烟气中没有氧气存在时，即还原性气氛较强时，一氧化氮对吸附剂脱除单质汞性能的促进作用会变得不再明显。这是可以理解的，因为在NO2的生成过程中，氧气是必不可少的反应物。根据现有文献的报道，在一定条件下，一氧化氮甚至会与气态单质汞产生竞争吸附，对烟气中单质汞的脱除产生抑制的作用[D-189]。

In the simulated flue gas containing NO, CO₂, and O₂, NOx can promote the oxidation of Hg0. The strong promoting effect of nitric oxide on elemental mercury removal can largely be attributed to the formation of nitrogen dioxide (NO2). Because nitrogen dioxide has strong oxidizing properties, it can react with elemental mercury in the adsorbed state on the surface of the adsorbent, as well as directly with gaseous elemental mercury in the simulated flue gas. The reaction processes belong to the Langmuir-Hinshelwood mechanism and the Eley-Rideal mechanism, respectively. However, when there is no oxygen present in the simulated flue gas, that is, in a strong reducing atmosphere, the promoting effect of nitric oxide on the removal of elemental mercury by the adsorbent becomes less pronounced. This is understandable because oxygen is essential in the generation of NO2. According to existing literature reports, under certain conditions, nitric oxide may even compete for adsorption with gaseous elemental mercury, resulting in an inhibitory effect on the removal of elemental mercury from the flue gas.

对于SOx，有研究指出，二氧化硫的引入会在一定程度上促进单质汞的氧化[D-178]。具体过程是二氧化硫首先与活性氧反应生成氧化性较强的三氧化硫，随后与单质汞发生氧化还原反应，生成硫酸汞和HgO[38]。但也有研究认为SO2会限制Hg的氧化。一方面，SO2会消耗参与Hg氧化反应的O自由基和OH自由基[39]；另一方面，二氧化硫与气态单质汞之间存在的竞争吸附会抑制单质汞的氧化与脱除[D-130]。此外，二氧化硫的负面影响还有另一个原因，当采用催化氧化法脱除Hg0时，二氧化硫的引入会使得催化剂表面官能团的组成发生改变[D-179]，而正是这个原因，导致二氧化硫对催化剂脱汞的抑制作用是不可逆的，催化剂的脱汞效率并不会因为二氧化硫浓度的降低而恢复。由此可见，富氧燃烧烟气中氮氧化物和硫氧化物对单质汞的氧化均会造成一定影响。对于本项目涉及的生物质富氧掺烧工况，以往的研究指出，由于富氧燃烧中N2含量很低且生物质燃料中S含量不多，烟气中NOx和SOx的含量均比传统燃煤锅炉中的要少[37]。因此，生物质富氧掺烧工况中，NOx和SOx对汞形态分布的影响需进一步明确。

For SOx, studies have indicated that the introduction of sulfur dioxide can to some extent promote the oxidation of elemental mercury. The specific process involves sulfur dioxide reacting with active oxygen to generate the strongly oxidizing sulfur trioxide, which then undergoes a redox reaction with elemental mercury to produce mercuric sulfate and HgO. However, some studies suggest that SO2 may limit the oxidation of mercury. On the one hand, SO2 can consume O and OH radicals that are involved in the oxidation of mercury reactions. On the other hand, the competitive adsorption between sulfur dioxide and gaseous elemental mercury can inhibit the oxidation and removal of elemental mercury. Furthermore, the negative impact of sulfur dioxide has another reason – when using catalytic oxidation to remove Hg0, the introduction of sulfur dioxide can alter the composition of the surface functional groups of the catalyst, leading to irreversible inhibition of the mercury removal by the catalyst. The mercury removal efficiency of the catalyst will not recover with decreased sulfur dioxide concentration. It is evident that nitrogen oxides and sulfur oxides in oxygen-rich combustion flue gas will have a certain impact on the oxidation of elemental mercury. In the oxygen-rich co-combustion conditions with biomass studied in this project, previous research has shown that due to the low N2 content and low sulfur content in biomass fuel, the concentrations of NOx and SOx in the flue gas are lower than those in traditional coal-fired boilers. Therefore, the effects of NOx and SOx on the mercury distribution in biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion conditions need further clarification.
飞灰方面，樊保国、沈伯雄等人的研究均表明，富氧燃烧烟气中的飞灰浓度高，这对于颗粒相汞的形成是有利的[32,33]。类似地，Stam等人发现，富氧燃烧烟气中痕量元素会由于烟气再循环的原因而富集[31]。

Regarding fly ash, studies by Fan Baoguo, Shen Boxiong, and others have all indicated that the concentration of fly ash is high in oxygen-rich combustion flue gas, which is favorable for the formation of particulate mercury. Similarly, Stam et al. found that trace elements in oxygen-rich combustion flue gas tend to accumulate due to flue gas recirculation.

由于氧化态的汞具有较高的溶解度，Hg2+在WFGD系统中易被脱硫浆液和脱硫废水捕获，达到烟气脱汞的目的。因此，将单质汞转化为氧化态的汞，是烟气脱汞的关键策略。然而，WFGD系统中的Hg2+会在一定条件下被还原，并再次以Hg0的形式释放至烟气中，对烟气脱汞效率造成不利影响[X]。特别是在富氧燃烧系统中，对烟气中汞浓度的要求比传统电站更加严格，再释放的Hg0可能导致烟气中汞浓度无法满足深度脱汞的要求，威胁系统的安全运行。因此，有必要在富氧燃烧条件下，针对WFGD系统Hg0的再释放进行研究。

Due to the high solubility of oxidized mercury, Hg2+ is easily captured by desulfurization slurries and desulfurization wastewater in Wet Flue Gas Desulfurization (WFGD) systems, achieving the purpose of mercury removal from flue gas. Therefore, converting elemental mercury into oxidized mercury is a key strategy for flue gas mercury removal. However, Hg2+ in WFGD systems can be reduced under certain conditions and released back into the flue gas in the form of Hg0, adversely affecting the efficiency of flue gas mercury removal. Especially in oxygen-rich combustion systems, stricter requirements are imposed on mercury concentrations in flue gas compared to traditional power plants, and the re-release of Hg0 may lead to mercury concentrations in the flue gas failing to meet the requirements for deep mercury removal, threatening the safe operation of the system. Therefore, it is necessary to conduct research on the re-release of Hg0 in WFGD systems under oxygen-rich combustion conditions.

Ochoa-González等[JHM]研究了富氧燃烧烟气主要成分(CO2、O2和H2O) 对湿式洗涤塔中Hg0再排放的影响。水蒸气的浓度对汞的再排放没有影响，而O2和CO2的浓度对汞的再排放有显著影响。由于氧与处于低氧化态的金属发生反应，烟气中高浓度的O2阻止了Hg0的再排放，特别是当石灰石中的金属杂质是导致Hg0再排放的主要因素时，O2对浆液中汞的稳定作用更明显。高浓度的二氧化碳会导致石膏浆料的pH值降低，并影响氧化还原电位，从而抑制了Hg0的再释放。

Ochoa-González et al. [JHM] studied the influence of the main components (CO2, O2, and H2O) in oxygen-rich combustion flue gas on the re-emission of Hg0 in wet scrubbers. The concentration of water vapor has no effect on the re-emission of mercury, while the concentrations of O2 and CO2 have a significant impact on the re-emission of mercury. Due to the reaction of oxygen with metals in a low oxidation state, high concentrations of O2 in the flue gas inhibit the re-emission of Hg0, especially when metal impurities in limestone are the main factors causing the re-emission of Hg0, the stabilizing effect of O2 on mercury in the slurry is more pronounced. High concentrations of carbon dioxide lead to a decrease in the pH of the gypsum slurry and affect the redox potential, thereby inhibiting the re-release of Hg0.

Xu等[EF]研究了O2，CO2和Fe，Mn，Ni等金属元素对Hg0再释放的影响。结果表明，在纯净的N2气氛中加入O2，由于pH值明显下降，可以显著增强Hg0的再释放，而在N2气氛中加入75%的CO2，由于pH值下降较低，Hg0的再释放量有限。富氧燃烧气氛下，O2浓度从3%增加到6%，Hg0的再释放量有所下降。O2浓度进一步升高至12%，对Hg0再释放没有显著影响。较高的CO2浓度对汞的再释放不利，更多的汞保持在固相中。在N2气氛下，Fe2+、Mn2+、Ni2+等金属离子可促进Hg0再释放。但在空气和富氧燃烧气氛下，汞的再释放受到金属离子的抑制。Fe2+的抑制作用随着CO2浓度的增加而增强。相比空气气氛，在富氧燃烧气氛下Fe2+对汞再释放的作用更为明显。

Xu et al. [EF] studied the effects of O2, CO2, and metal elements such as Fe, Mn, and Ni on the re-emission of Hg0. The results indicate that adding O2 in a pure N2 atmosphere significantly enhances the re-release of Hg0 due to a significant decrease in pH. On the other hand, adding 75% CO2 in a N2 atmosphere limits the re-release of Hg0 because of a lower pH decrease. In an oxygen-rich combustion atmosphere, increasing the O2 concentration from 3% to 6% leads to a slight decrease in the re-release of Hg0. Further increasing the O2 concentration to 12% does not have a significant effect on the re-release of Hg0. Higher CO2 concentrations are unfavorable for the re-release of mercury, as more mercury remains in the solid phase. In a N2 atmosphere, metal ions such as Fe2+, Mn2+, and Ni2+ can promote the re-release of Hg0. However, in air and oxygen-rich combustion atmospheres, the re-release of mercury is inhibited by metal ions. The inhibitory effect of Fe2+ increases with increasing CO2 concentration. Compared to an air atmosphere, the effect of Fe2+ on the re-release of mercury is more pronounced in an oxygen-rich combustion atmosphere.

Xu等[Fuel]在以上研究的基础上，针对金属离子对汞再释放的影响进行了更加深入的研究。在空气和富氧气氛下，虽然Fe2+、Fe3+、Mn2+和Cu2+等离子可以抑制汞的再释放，但在初始阶段，Hg的再释放实际上是被促进的。随后，Fe2+、Fe3+、Mn2+和Cu2+对液相中汞的稳定表现出积极的影响，并且Fe2+/Fe3+的沉淀物也可以吸附固相中的汞，从而抵消了初始阶段Hg0再排放的加速。随着CO2浓度的增加，对Fe2+、Fe3+和Cu2+的抑制作用增强，而Mn2+的抑制作用略有减弱。O2浓度的增加会促进Mn2+对Hg0再排放的抑制作用，而对Cu2+的抑制作用几乎没有影响。

Building upon the previous research, Xu et al. [Fuel] conducted a more in-depth study on the effects of metal ions on the re-emission of mercury. In air and oxygen-rich atmospheres, although ions such as Fe2+, Fe3+, Mn2+, and Cu2+ can inhibit the re-emission of mercury, in the initial stage, the re-emission of Hg is actually promoted. Subsequently, Fe2+, Fe3+, Mn2+, and Cu2+ exhibit a positive effect on the stability of mercury in the liquid phase, and the precipitates of Fe2+/Fe3+ can also adsorb mercury in the solid phase, counteracting the initial acceleration of Hg0 re-emission. With increased CO2 concentration, the inhibitory effects of Fe2+, Fe3+, and Cu2+ are enhanced, while the inhibitory effect of Mn2+ is slightly weakened. Increasing O2 concentration promotes the inhibitory effect of Mn2+ on the re-emission of Hg0, with almost no effect on the inhibitory effect of Cu2+.
总的来看，富氧燃烧条件下，烟气中汞的形态转化以及WFGD系统中汞的再释放过程均与空气条件下有所差别。对生物质富氧掺烧系统来说，需同时考虑生物质和富氧燃烧两方面的影响。

In general, under oxygen-rich combustion conditions, the transformation of mercury forms in the flue gas and the re-release of mercury in WFGD systems differ from those under air conditions. For biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion systems, the impacts of both biomass and oxygen-rich combustion need to be considered simultaneously.
为了实现BECCS系统的深度脱汞，依靠现有设备辅助脱汞已经难以满足要求，必须采用专门的脱汞手段，降低烟气中的汞浓度。吸附法和催化氧化法是常用的专门脱汞方法。

In order to achieve deep mercury removal in BECCS systems, relying on existing equipment for auxiliary mercury removal is no longer sufficient to meet the requirements. Specialized mercury removal methods must be employed to reduce the mercury concentration in the flue gas. Adsorption and catalytic oxidation are commonly used specialized mercury removal methods.

吸附法脱汞是通过向烟道中喷入吸附剂，促进气相单质汞或氧化态汞向颗粒态汞的转化，进而被除尘设备脱除的脱汞方法，该方法已实现部分工业应用。是否可以获取高性能脱汞吸附剂是该方法能否大规模推广的关键。目前，吸附法脱汞中最主流的技术是活性炭喷射技术（Activated Carbon Injection，ACI）[70]。该技术可以实现理想的脱汞效率，并且已在实际锅炉中有所应用。然而，根据美国EPA及能源部的估算，ACI技术的运行成本很高，脱除1 kg汞需花费数万甚至十数万美元，这对于大部分燃煤电站来说是难以接受的。为了降低ACI技术的运行成本，许多学者针对活性炭的改性进行了研究，以期提高活性炭的脱汞效率，从而减少活性炭的使用量。Cai等利用气相沉积方法对活性炭进行改性，发现经碘蒸气处理后的活性炭的单质汞吸附容量远大于经溴蒸气改性的活性炭[71]。Tong等则利用KI对活性炭进行改性处理，显著提升了活性炭对汞的脱除效率[72]。Li等研究发现，虽然经过NH4Br改性后的活性炭比表面积有所下降，但是其汞吸附能力却明显提高[73]。Luo等通过沥滤法及热分解法对吸附在FeCl3改性活性炭上的汞的稳定性进行研究，发现吸附后的汞稳定性好，沥滤液中的汞含量远低于安全限值[74]。考虑到常温下硫与汞的高反应活性，硫改性活性炭同样得到了学者的大量关注，包括硫改性活性炭的脱汞机理、不同的改性方法、烟气组分对脱汞效率的影响等[75-84]。Sun等则利用硝酸对活性炭进行预处理，提高了活性炭的汞吸附能力[85]。此外，对活性炭的改性方法还有碱金属改性、过度金属氧化物改性、等离子体改性等[86-90]。

Mercury removal by adsorption is a method that involves injecting adsorbents into the flue gas duct to promote the transformation of gaseous elemental mercury or oxidized mercury into particulate mercury, which can then be removed by the dust removal equipment. This method has been partially implemented in industrial applications. The key to the large-scale promotion of this method lies in obtaining high-performance mercury adsorbents. Currently, the most mainstream technology for mercury removal by adsorption is Activated Carbon Injection (ACI). This technology can achieve ideal mercury removal efficiency and has been applied in practical boilers. However, according to estimates by the U.S. EPA and Department of Energy, the operational costs of ACI technology are very high, costing tens of thousands or even hundreds of thousands of dollars to remove 1 kg of mercury, which is deemed unacceptable for most coal-fired power plants. In order to reduce the operational costs of ACI technology, many researchers have studied the modification of activated carbon to enhance mercury removal efficiency and reduce the amount of activated carbon used. Cai et al. modified activated carbon using the gas phase deposition method and found that the activated carbon treated with iodine vapor had a much higher adsorption capacity for elemental mercury compared to activated carbon modified with bromine vapor. Tong et al. used KI for the modification of activated carbon, significantly improving the efficiency of mercury removal. Li et al. found that although the specific surface area of activated carbon decreased after modification with NH4Br, its mercury adsorption capacity significantly increased. Luo et al. studied the stability of mercury adsorbed on FeCl3-modified activated carbon using filtration and thermal decomposition methods and found that the stability of the adsorbed mercury was good, with the mercury content in the filtrate being far below the safety limit. Considering the high reactivity of sulfur with mercury at room temperature, sulfur-modified activated carbon has also received significant attention from scholars, including research on the mercury removal mechanisms, different modification methods, and the influence of flue gas components on mercury removal efficiency. Sun et al. pretreated activated carbon with nitric acid, enhancing the mercury adsorption capacity of the activated carbon. In addition, other modification methods for activated carbon include alkali metal modification, transition metal oxide modification, and plasma modification.

除了活性炭之外，部分学者针对矿石类吸附剂的脱汞效率开展了研究[91]。不过此类吸附剂本身脱汞效率并不太高，故需要进行改性处理，如向天然沸石中掺杂银或氯化铜等，当吸附剂用量足够后，可以基本满足汞排放标准[92-94]。此外，膨润土、蛭石等经过改性处理后亦可达到较好的脱汞效果[95, 96]。燃煤烟气中会携带大量的飞灰，有学者指出，飞灰中的未燃尽碳和含氧官能团也具有一定的脱汞能力[97, 98]。飞灰相对廉价易得的特性，使其成为一种具有潜力的脱汞吸附剂。飞灰对汞的脱除效率受许多因素的影响。温度下降，脱汞效率增加；未燃尽碳含量越多，脱汞效率越高；比表面积越大，脱汞效率越高；氯元素的含量与飞灰的脱汞效率正相关；烟气中的酸性气体，如HCl、H2SO4、NO2等对飞灰的脱汞能力有促进作用[60]。为进一步提高飞灰脱汞效率，部分学者对飞灰改性展开了研究。Xu等利用CuBr2、CuCl2、FeCl3处理飞灰后，均取得较高的脱汞效率[99]。Diao等则利用氧化钙对飞灰进行改性，发现当氧化钙质量比为33%时，改性飞灰达到最高的脱汞效率[100]。

In addition to activated carbon, some researchers have studied the mercury removal efficiency of ore-based adsorbents. However, these types of sorbents do not have very high intrinsic mercury removal efficiency and require modification. For example, natural zeolites doped with silver or cupric chloride can meet the mercury emission standards when used in sufficient quantities. Furthermore, modified bentonite and vermiculite can also achieve good mercury removal effects. In coal-fired flue gas, a significant amount of fly ash is carried. Some scholars have pointed out that unburned carbon and oxygen-containing functional groups in fly ash also have certain mercury removal capabilities. Due to its relatively low cost and accessibility, fly ash has the potential to be a promising mercury adsorbent. The efficiency of mercury removal by fly ash is influenced by many factors. Decreasing temperature leads to an increase in mercury removal efficiency; higher unburned carbon content results in higher mercury removal efficiency; a larger specific surface area corresponds to higher mercury removal efficiency; the chlorine content is positively correlated with the mercury removal efficiency of fly ash; acidic gases in flue gas, such as HCl, H2SO4, NO2, have a promoting effect on the mercury removal capacity of fly ash. To further improve the mercury removal efficiency of fly ash, some researchers have conducted studies on the modification of fly ash. Xu et al. achieved high mercury removal efficiency by treating fly ash with CuBr2, CuCl2, and FeCl3. Diao et al. modified fly ash with calcium oxide and found that when the mass ratio of calcium oxide was 33%, the modified fly ash achieved the highest mercury removal efficiency.

贵金属如钯（Pb）、铑（Rh）、铱（Ir）、金（Au）、银（Ag）等具有一定的脱汞能力。Hou等利用浸渍法制备了Pb- Al2O3吸附剂并测试了其在高温下对模拟烟气中单质汞的脱除效率。该吸附剂的脱汞能力大多是由于汞在其表面形成了Pb-Hg汞齐[101]。金元素十分稳定，且对汞具有较强的吸引力，Au-Hg汞齐在高温下也难以分解。学者向活性炭中添加金元素，并以氯元素作为辅助，制备出了性能优异的脱汞吸附剂[102]。Shirkhanloo等将纳米银颗粒负载在小玻璃珠上，用于单质汞的脱除，结果表明，该材料在60 ℃时具有最高的脱汞效率，在245 ℃时，汞从吸附剂上脱附[103]。

Precious metals such as palladium (Pd), rhodium (Rh), iridium (Ir), gold (Au), and silver (Ag) have certain mercury removal capabilities. Hou et al. prepared Pb-Al2O3 adsorbents using impregnation method and tested their efficiency in removing elemental mercury from simulated flue gas at high temperatures. The mercury removal ability of this adsorbent is mostly attributed to the formation of Pb-Hg mercury phases on its surface. Gold is highly stable and has a strong attraction to mercury, and Au-Hg mercury phases are also difficult to decompose at high temperatures. Scholars have added gold elements to activated carbon and used chlorine as an auxiliary to prepare high-performance mercury adsorbents. Shirkhanloo et al. loaded nano-silver particles on small glass beads for the removal of elemental mercury. The results showed that this material had the highest mercury removal efficiency at 60°C, and mercury desorbed from the adsorbent at 245°C.

实际上，吸附法脱汞的核心是将烟气中的气态汞转变为颗粒态汞进而被除尘设备脱除，研制高效低成本的脱汞吸附剂是该方法获得大规模应用的前提保证。设法降低吸附剂运行成本是以上所有脱汞吸附剂相关研究的最终目的。不过，改性活性炭和改性贵金属材料自身的成本过高，使得此类措施对压缩吸附法脱汞运行成本的帮助十分有限；而矿石类吸附剂和飞灰吸附剂的脱汞效率仍相对较低，且易受多种因素的影响，特别是氯元素含量的高低直接决定了此类吸附剂的实际脱汞效果。因此，寻求一种高效稳定、相对廉价易得的脱汞吸附剂仍是限制吸附法脱汞技术广泛推广的主要瓶颈。

In fact, the core of mercury removal by adsorption is to convert gaseous mercury in the flue gas into particulate mercury for removal by dust removal equipment. The development of high-efficiency and low-cost mercury adsorbents is essential to ensure the widespread application of this method. The ultimate goal of all the related research on mercury adsorbents is to reduce the operational costs of the adsorbents. However, the high cost of modified activated carbon and modified precious metal materials limits their effectiveness in reducing the operational costs of adsorption-based mercury removal methods. Additionally, the efficiency of ore-based adsorbents and fly ash adsorbents for mercury removal is relatively low and susceptible to various factors, especially the chlorine content, which directly determines the actual mercury removal effectiveness of these adsorbents. Therefore, the search for high-efficiency, stable, relatively inexpensive, and readily available mercury adsorbents remains the main bottleneck restricting the widespread adoption of adsorption-based mercury removal technology.

部分过渡金属或过渡金属氧化物可以作为催化剂，促进单质汞向氧化态汞的转变。文献表明，铁（Fe）基材料可以实现较好的单质汞氧化效果[104-107]。不过，有学者指出，若燃用的煤种为次烟煤，铁基材料对单质汞的氧化效率较低，且各烟气组分的浓度亦会产生一定影响[74, 108, 109]。孔凡海制备了新型铁基纳米材料并测试了其在模拟烟气中的脱汞性能，结果表明水热法制备的纳米氧化铁二氧化硅材料具有理想的脱汞效率及吸附容量，汞在材料表面发生的反应是吸附速率控制步骤，NO、HCl对单质汞的脱除有利，而SO2则会抑制其脱汞效果[70]。杨士健以赤铁矿为原料制备出了一系列磁性铁基尖晶石，此类材料具有容易回收利用的特点，具有一定的应用前景[110]。

Some transition metals or transition metal oxides can serve as catalysts to promote the transformation of elemental mercury into oxidized mercury. Literature indicates that iron (Fe)-based materials can achieve good oxidation efficiency of elemental mercury. However, some scholars have pointed out that for the combustion of bituminous coal, iron-based materials exhibit lower efficiency in oxidizing elemental mercury, and the concentrations of various flue gas components can also have an impact. Kong Fanhai prepared a novel iron-based nanomaterial and tested its mercury removal performance in simulated flue gas. The results showed that nano-iron oxide-silica material prepared by hydrothermal method had ideal mercury removal efficiency and adsorption capacity, with the reaction occurring on the material surface being the rate-limiting step. Nitric oxide (NO) and hydrogen chloride (HCl) were beneficial for the removal of elemental mercury, while sulfur dioxide (SO2) would inhibit its mercury removal effectiveness. Yang Shijian used hematite as a raw material to prepare a series of magnetic iron-based spinel materials, which are easily recyclable and have potential applications.

锰（Mn）元素具有多种氧化价态，化合价可以在+2价到+6价的范围内变化，因此，锰的氧化物具有较活跃的晶格氧[111]。与其它催化剂相比，锰基催化剂可在更低温度区间内实现较高的单质汞氧化效率[112-114]。研究表明，低于170 ℃时锰基催化剂即可表现出较好的催化效果[115]。将MnO2与Ca(OH)2或Al2O3混合，均可实现烟气中气相单质汞的催化氧化，不过浓度较高的SO2会对汞氧化效率造成抑制[116, 117]。为此，有学者提出添加Mo元素的方法以防止锰基催化剂的硫中毒[118]。Scala等向氧化铝和堇青石中加入锰的氧化物，得到了较好的吸附性能[111]。Xu等采用湿式浸渍法向商用菱镁石中加入锰元素，制备出了在低温下具有高效脱汞能力的新型吸附剂[119]。Ji等将锰的氧化物添加到二氧化钛之中，取得了较高的脱汞效率，理化表征结果表明四价锰及氧化物中的晶格氧对单质汞的氧化起到了重要作用[120]。

Manganese (Mn) element exhibits various oxidation states, with the valence ranging from +2 to +6, making manganese oxides possess active lattice oxygen. Compared to other catalysts, manganese-based catalysts can achieve high oxidation efficiency of elemental mercury at lower temperature ranges. Studies have shown that manganese-based catalysts exhibit good catalytic effects at temperatures below 170°C. Mixing MnO2 with Ca(OH)2 or Al2O3 can catalyze the oxidation of gaseous elemental mercury in the flue gas, but high concentrations of sulfur dioxide (SO2) can inhibit the mercury oxidation efficiency. To address this, some scholars have proposed the addition of molybdenum (Mo) element to prevent sulfur poisoning of manganese-based catalysts. Scala et al. achieved good adsorption performance by adding manganese oxides to alumina and vermiculite. Xu et al. used a wet impregnation method to add manganese elements to commercial magnesite, creating a novel adsorbent with high efficiency in mercury removal at low temperatures. Ji et al. incorporated manganese oxides into titanium dioxide, achieving high mercury removal efficiency. Physicochemical characterization results indicated that tetravalent manganese and lattice oxygen in the oxides play a crucial role in the oxidation of elemental mercury.

铜（Cu）是一种相对来说成本较低的过渡金属元素，由于其氧化态可以在二价铜与一价铜之间转换，铜的氧化物也具有一定储氧能力，具有较好的催化氧化效果[121]。Kim等采用化学镀层的方法向多孔碳材料上负载了铜，研究其脱除烟气中单质汞的能力。结果表明，负载了铜之后，虽然材料的比表面积及总孔容有所下降，然而单质汞的脱除效率明显提升[122]。杜雯制备了CuOx-Al2O3材料，取得了较好的脱汞效果，若将其与活性炭按一定比例混合，可以一定程度上降低ACI技术的运行成本[123]。Zhao等利用铜的氧化物对活性焦进行改性处理，测试结果显示，改性后，活性焦的表面官能团发生改变，脱汞能力因此提高[124]。钴（Co）元素是常见的催化剂成分，钴基材料具有较强的催化氧化能力，可以促进烟气中单质汞的氧化，从而达到降低汞排放的效果。有学者分别将Co的氧化物与二氧化钛或氧化铝结合，获得了良好的脱汞性能[125, 126]。为了进一步提高催化剂的脱汞能力和抗硫能力，学者将多种金属氧化物混合，包括Mn、Cu、Co、Al等，研究不同混合比例对其催化氧化性能的影响[127]。

Copper (Cu) is a relatively low-cost transition metal element that can switch between the +1 and +2 oxidation states. Copper oxides possess oxygen storage capacity and exhibit good catalytic oxidation effects. Kim et al. coated porous carbon materials with copper using a chemical deposition method to study their ability to remove elemental mercury from flue gas. The results showed that loading copper onto the materials led to a significant improvement in mercury removal efficiency, despite the decrease in specific surface area and total pore volume. Du Wen prepared CuOx-Al2O3 materials, achieving good mercury removal effects. When mixed with activated carbon in a certain proportion, it can help reduce the operational costs of ACI technology. Zhao et al. modified activated coke with copper oxides, demonstrating that the modification altered the surface functional groups of the activated coke and enhanced its mercury removal capacity. Cobalt (Co) is a common catalyst component with strong catalytic oxidation abilities. Cobalt-based materials can promote the oxidation of elemental mercury in flue gas to reduce mercury emissions. Scholars have combined cobalt oxides with titanium dioxide or alumina, obtaining favorable mercury removal performance. To further enhance the mercury removal and sulfur resistance capabilities of catalysts, researchers have mixed various metal oxides, including Mn, Cu, Co, Al, and studied the impact of different mixing ratios on their catalytic oxidation performance.
值得注意的是，生物质中较高的氯元素和碱金属元素都可用于吸附剂或催化剂的改性，提升脱汞性能。此外，富氧燃烧烟气中高浓度的CO2，可能会在材料表面产生更多的活性位，提升脱汞效率[EF-ActivatedCarbonforCapturing]。充分利用这些特性，是研发BECCS系统中深度脱汞技术的关键。

It is worth noting that the higher chlorine and alkali metal elements in biomass can be utilized for the modification of adsorbents or catalysts to enhance mercury removal performance. Additionally, the high concentration of CO2 in oxygen-rich combustion flue gas may generate more active sites on the material surface, thereby improving mercury removal efficiency. Fully utilizing these characteristics is essential for the development of advanced mercury removal technologies in BECCS systems.
生物质富氧掺烧是极具潜力的生物质能耦合碳捕集封存（BECCS）技术，是电力系统低碳改造的重要突破点。然而，其烟气中的汞不仅会造成污染，威胁生态和人体健康，还易与金属设备发生汞齐化反应，而引发严重的安全事故。因此，常规的脱汞手段已经难以满足亟需研发面向BECCS的深度脱汞技术以规避该安全隐患。

Biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion is a highly promising biomass energy coupled with carbon capture and storage (BECCS) technology and represents a crucial breakthrough in the low-carbon transformation of the power system. However, the presence of mercury in the flue gas not only causes pollution, threatening ecology and human health, but also can react with metal equipment, leading to serious safety incidents. Therefore, conventional mercury removal methods are no longer adequate to address the urgent need for the development of advanced mercury removal technologies tailored for BECCS to mitigate this safety hazard.
将难以脱除的单质汞转化为较易脱除的氧化态汞和颗粒相汞，是控制汞污染排放的核心策略。然而，与传统空气条件下的燃煤工况相比，生物质富氧掺烧系统的烟气组分有明显区别。揭示各主要组分对汞形态分布的影响，是深度脱汞技术研发的理论基础。

Transforming difficult-to-remove elemental mercury into more easily removable oxidized mercury and particulate mercury is the core strategy for controlling mercury pollution emissions. However, compared to traditional coal combustion under air conditions, biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion systems have distinct flue gas compositions. Understanding the influence of each major component on mercury speciation distribution is essential for the theoretical foundation of developing advanced mercury removal technologies.

氯是汞氧化反应中的重要反应物。生物质中氯元素含量较高，燃烧产生的烟气中含氯组分可通过均相反应和非均相反应与单质汞发生氧化还原反应，将Hg0转化为HgCl2。这有利于深度脱汞目标的实现，特别是在以低氯煤为燃料的机组中，掺烧生物质带来的促进作用更为显著。生物质掺烧后，烟气中灰分和未燃尽碳的浓度下降，而细微颗粒物浓度可能会因破碎，气化-凝结等过程而有所增加，这些颗粒物具有较大的比表面积，汞可能会富集在其表面。生物质中具有丰富的碱金属，这些碱金属会随燃烧而释放至烟气中。均相体系的热力型计算结果表明，K/Na等元素会促进Hg的氧化。同时，碱性组分吸附至飞灰上后，可通过非均相反应影响汞的形态分布。

Chlorine is an important reactant in mercury oxidation reactions. Biomass typically contains high levels of chlorine, and chlorine components in the flue gas generated by combustion can undergo homogeneous and heterogeneous reactions with elemental mercury to convert Hg0 into HgCl2 through redox reactions. This is beneficial for achieving the goal of deep mercury removal, especially in units burning low-chlorine coal where the synergistic effect of biomass co-combustion is more significant. After biomass co-combustion, the concentrations of ash and unburned carbon in the flue gas decrease, while the concentration of fine particulate matter may increase due to processes such as fracturing and gasification-condensation. These particulate matters have a large specific surface area, where mercury may accumulate on their surfaces. Biomass contains abundant alkali metals, and these alkali metals are released into the flue gas during combustion. Thermodynamic calculations in homogeneous systems suggest that elements such as K/Na can promote the oxidation of mercury. Furthermore, alkaline components adsorbed onto fly ash can affect the speciation distribution of mercury through heterogeneous reactions.

富氧燃烧烟气中，高浓度的CO2可以通过营造还原性气氛，减少NO2的生成，消耗Cl基团等路径抑制Hg的氧化。不过也有学者指出，CO2有利于自由O原子的生成，但其效果有限。富氧燃烧烟气中H2O也可能会抑制Hg的氧化。总体而言，生物质富氧掺烧烟气中的NOx和SOx比传统燃煤烟气中的浓度低，但考虑到NOx和SOx对汞氧化反应的影响均具有两面性，二者对汞形态分布的影响仍不可忽略。此外，富氧燃烧烟气中飞灰浓度比空气条件下的高，这对单质汞的脱除是有利的。生物质富氧掺烧系统中，WFGD设备里汞的再释放需得到重视。高浓度的二氧化碳会降低石膏浆料的pH值和氧化还原电位，从而抑制了Hg0的再释放。Fe2+等金属离子也可抑制汞的再释放，且抑制作用随着CO2浓度的增加而增强。相比空气气氛，在富氧燃烧气氛下Fe2+对汞再释放的作用更为明显。

In oxygen-rich combustion flue gas, high concentrations of CO2 can create a reducing atmosphere, reduce the formation of NO2, consume Cl groups, and inhibit the oxidation of mercury. However, some scholars also point out that while CO2 may promote the generation of free oxygen atoms, its effect is limited. Additionally, water vapor in oxygen-rich combustion flue gas may also inhibit the oxidation of mercury. Overall, the concentrations of NOx and SOx in biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion flue gas are lower than those in traditional coal combustion flue gas. However, considering that the effects of NOx and SOx on mercury oxidation reactions are both complex, their impact on mercury speciation distribution should not be overlooked. Furthermore, the concentration of fly ash in oxygen-rich combustion flue gas is higher compared to that under air conditions, which is advantageous for the removal of elemental mercury. In biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion systems, attention should be paid to the re-release of mercury in Wet Flue Gas Desulfurization (WFGD) equipment. High concentrations of carbon dioxide can reduce the pH and redox potential of gypsum slurry, thereby inhibiting the re-release of Hg0. Metal ions such as Fe2+ can also inhibit the re-release of mercury, and the inhibitory effect increases with the increase in CO2 concentration. In an oxygen-rich combustion atmosphere, the effect of Fe2+ on the re-release of mercury is more pronounced compared to an air atmosphere.

依靠现有污染物脱除设备辅助脱汞已经难以满足生物质富氧掺烧系统的汞浓度要求，必须采用吸附法和催化氧化法等专门的脱汞手段。寻求高效稳定、相对成本较低的脱汞吸附剂和催化剂是深度脱汞技术推广应用的前提。生物质中较高的氯元素和碱金属元素可提升材料的脱汞性能，同时，富氧燃烧烟气中高浓度的CO2，可能会在材料表面产生更多的活性位，以上特性均对单质汞的脱除有利。
在今后的研究中，针对生物质富氧掺烧后的烟气汞污染控制，需深入揭示氯及碱金属等烟气组分对汞氧化反应的影响机理，并理清各组分之间的交互作用。同时，构建汞均相及非均相反应的动力学模型，并获得相关动力学参数，以准确预测汞形态分布。最后，在脱汞吸附剂和催化剂研发方面，要充分结合生物质富氧掺烧条件下，烟气中氯/碱金属/CO2浓度较高等特性，进一步提升材料的性能。

Relying on existing pollution control equipment for auxiliary mercury removal is no longer sufficient to meet the mercury concentration requirements of biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion systems. Special mercury removal methods such as adsorption and catalytic oxidation must be employed. The key to widespread application of advanced mercury removal technologies lies in the search for highly efficient, stable, and relatively cost-effective mercury adsorbents and catalysts. The higher chlorine and alkali metal elements in biomass can enhance the material's mercury removal performance. Additionally, the high concentration of CO2 in oxygen-rich combustion flue gas may create more active sites on the material surface, which is beneficial for removing elemental mercury.

In future research on mercury pollution control in biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion flue gas, it is crucial to deepen the understanding of the mechanisms by which chlorine and alkali metal components in the flue gas affect mercury oxidation reactions, as well as elucidate the interactions between various components. Furthermore, constructing kinetic models for homogeneous and heterogeneous mercury reactions and obtaining relevant kinetic parameters will enable accurate prediction of mercury speciation distribution. Lastly, in the development of mercury adsorbents and catalysts, it is essential to fully consider the characteristics of biomass-rich oxygen co-combustion conditions, such as high chlorine/alkali metal/CO2 concentrations in the flue gas, in order to further enhance the performance of the materials.
